emails.subject: Confirmation: Weekly Schedule, December 4-7, 2000
emails.body: Vince: Do you know about these meeting? Do you want to send someone in your place? Shirley Forwarded by Shirley Crenshaw/HOU/ECT on 12/01/2000 01:50 PM From: Paulett Smith@EES on 12/01/2000 01:00 PM
